# LeadForge — Ruflo Multi-Agent Build Configuration

## Project Context
Building an all-in-one lead import, qualification & cold email platform for one-person agencies.
Stack: Python FastAPI + PostgreSQL (Supabase) + Temporal.io + DeepSeek V4 (via OpenRouter)

## Documentation
- BRD: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vmq0YAESYeNuExT8pabSUPjeCcLjXH2_/view
- Technical Plan: TECHNICAL_PLAN.md
- Project Plan: PROJECT_PLAN.md
- Issues: https://github.com/ermohitsain/leadforge/issues

## Ruflo Integration (auto-generated by ruflo init)
When working on multi-file tasks or complex features, use ToolSearch to find and invoke ruflo MCP tools.
Key tools: memory_store, memory_search, hooks_route, swarm_init, agent_spawn.
Check system-reminder tags for [INTELLIGENCE] pattern suggestions before starting work.

## Build Instructions
Start by reading the first issue (#1) and building it with ruflo:
1. Read the issue requirements
2. Read TECHNICAL_PLAN.md for architecture
3. Use ruflo to spawn agents for parallel work
4. Build, test, commit

## Swarm Configuration
- Topology: hierarchical-mesh (anti-drift)
- Max Agents: 8
- Memory: hybrid
- Default Provider: deepseek-chat (via OpenRouter)

## Agent Routing
| Task | Agents | Topology |
|------|--------|----------|
| Backend API | architect, coder, tester | hierarchical |
| Temporal Workflows | coder, tester | hierarchical |
| Database Models | coder, tester | hierarchical |
| Frontend | coder, reviewer | hierarchical |
| Testing | tester, reviewer | hierarchical |

## Repo Structure
```
leadforge/
├── backend/           # FastAPI + Temporal workers
├── frontend/          # Next.js (Phase 1+)
├── temporal/          # Temporal docker-compose
├── .claude/           # Claude Code config
├── .claude-flow/      # Ruflo config
├── TECHNICAL_PLAN.md
└── PROJECT_PLAN.md
```
